homepage_counts_check.name: homepage_counts_check
homepage_counts_check.value: "homepage_config"."popular_count" BETWEEN 1 AND 12 AND "homepage_config"."latest_count" BETWEEN 1 AND 12 AND "homepage_config"."diet_box_count" BETWEEN 1 AND 12 AND "homepage_config"."seasonal_box_count" BETWEEN 1 AND 12

media_geo_idx.name: media_geo_idx
media_geo_idx.where: "media_image"."lat" IS NOT NULL AND "media_image"."lng" IS NOT NULL
